metadata.description: Oracle test cases for MC 1.8.9 combat damage calculations
notes: MC 1.8.9 armor formula: each armor point reduces damage by 4%
Protection enchantment: each level adds 4% reduction (max 80% from all sources)
Resistance effect: each level reduces damage by 20%
All reductions are multiplicative in final calculation

damage_tests.name: unarmored_10_damage
damage_tests.description: 10 damage to unarmored target

damage_tests.name: full_diamond_10_damage
damage_tests.description: 10 damage to full diamond armor (20 armor points)

damage_tests.name: diamond_with_prot4_single_piece
damage_tests.description: 10 damage with Protection IV on one armor piece

damage_tests.name: diamond_full_prot4
damage_tests.description: 10 damage with Protection IV on all 4 armor pieces (16 total prot levels)

damage_tests.name: iron_armor_10_damage
damage_tests.description: 10 damage to full iron armor (15 armor points)

damage_tests.name: chainmail_10_damage
damage_tests.description: 10 damage to full chainmail armor (12 armor points)

damage_tests.name: leather_armor_10_damage
damage_tests.description: 10 damage to full leather armor (7 armor points)

damage_tests.name: resistance_1_10_damage
damage_tests.description: 10 damage with Resistance I effect

damage_tests.name: resistance_2_10_damage
damage_tests.description: 10 damage with Resistance II effect

damage_tests.name: diamond_resistance_2_10_damage
damage_tests.description: 10 damage to full diamond with Resistance II

damage_tests.name: ender_dragon_contact_unarmored
damage_tests.description: Ender Dragon contact damage (10) to unarmored player

damage_tests.name: ender_dragon_contact_diamond
damage_tests.description: Ender Dragon contact damage (10) to full diamond player

damage_tests.name: ender_dragon_breath_unarmored
damage_tests.description: Ender Dragon breath damage (6/sec) to unarmored player

damage_tests.name: diamond_sword_crit_unarmored
damage_tests.description: Diamond sword critical hit (10.5 damage) to unarmored target

damage_tests.name: diamond_sword_crit_iron
damage_tests.description: Diamond sword critical hit to full iron armor

damage_tests.name: bow_power5_unarmored
damage_tests.description: Fully charged bow with Power V (25 damage) to unarmored target

damage_tests.name: bow_power5_diamond
damage_tests.description: Fully charged bow with Power V to full diamond armor

damage_tests.name: fall_damage_5_blocks
damage_tests.description: Fall damage from 5 blocks (2 damage)
damage_tests.note: Fall damage bypasses armor but not Feather Falling/Protection

damage_tests.name: fall_damage_10_blocks_feather4
damage_tests.description: Fall damage from 10 blocks (7 damage) with Feather Falling IV
damage_tests.note: Feather Falling IV: 48% reduction (12% per level)

damage_tests.name: fire_damage_tick
damage_tests.description: Fire damage tick (1 damage) to unarmored player

damage_tests.name: fire_damage_fire_prot4
damage_tests.description: Fire damage with Fire Protection IV (32% reduction)

damage_tests.name: explosion_creeper_unarmored
damage_tests.description: Creeper explosion at close range (49 max damage) unarmored

damage_tests.name: explosion_creeper_diamond_blast4
damage_tests.description: Creeper explosion with full diamond + Blast Protection IV
damage_tests.note: Blast Prot IV on all pieces: 64% reduction, armor: 80%

damage_tests.name: wither_skull_unarmored
damage_tests.description: Wither skull direct hit (8 damage) unarmored

damage_tests.name: wither_effect_tick
damage_tests.description: Wither status effect tick (1 damage) - bypasses armor

damage_tests.name: void_damage
damage_tests.description: Void damage (4 damage/tick) - bypasses everything
damage_tests.note: Void damage bypasses all damage reduction

damage_tests.name: starvation_damage
damage_tests.description: Starvation damage (1 damage/tick) - bypasses armor

damage_tests.name: drowning_damage
damage_tests.description: Drowning damage (2 damage/tick) - bypasses armor
damage_tests.note: Drowning bypasses armor, Respiration helps air supply
